author: Matt
body:
I’m blushing at the mention, and silently thrilled that now apparently with a new website, I’ll have even more Burgo to read!

Your new website sounds like what I’ve been thinking as well – need an outlet for stuff like that, and I’m not sure that “lifeinallcaps.com” (seriously, I own that) is the appropriate place, but a) I’m trying to figure out how I am going to use that previously mentioned domain, and b) now I have jealously and two-website envy, so I need to get cracking.

Actually, I’m kidding about the jealousy and two-website envy.

Cheers!
